mapper.sql: s.subscription_id, s.member_id, s.category_id, c.name AS category_name, s.name, s.price, s.currency, s.billing_cycle, s.billing_anchor_day, s.billing_start_date, s.next_payment_date, s.payment_method, s.status, s.memo, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscription s INNER JOIN subscription_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id

SELECT
FROM subscription s INNER JOIN subscription_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id WHERE s.subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} AND s.member_id = #{memberId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subscription ( member_id, category_id, name, price, currency, billing_cycle, billing_anchor_day, billing_start_date, next_payment_date, payment_method, status, memo ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{currency}, #{billingCycle}, #{billingAnchorDay}, #{billingStartDate}, #{nextPaymentDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{status}, #{memo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE subscription SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, currency = #{currency}, billing_cycle = #{billingCycle}, billing_anchor_day = #{billingAnchorDay}, billing_start_date = #{billingStartDate}, next_payment_date = #{nextPaymentDate}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, status = #{status}, memo = #{memo} WHERE subscription_id = #{subscriptionId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
